hero.heading: Build immersive exhibitions that convert visitors into business.

features.title: Core Platform Features
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit to launch, manage, and scale world-class virtual exhibitions.

virtualStands.title: Virtual Stands
virtualStands.description: Immersive branded stands where enterprises showcase products, media, and live interactions.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Guide visitors instantly with smart event Q&A, recommendations, and multilingual support.

networking.title: Networking
networking.description: Create real business opportunities through chat, reach-out requests, and meeting flows.

liveEvents.title: Live Events
liveEvents.description: Run conferences, keynotes, and product sessions with real-time attendee engagement.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Enable direct purchases from stands with secure checkout and transparent order tracking.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Measure booth performance, lead quality, and attendee behavior with actionable insights.

experience.title: Platform Experience
experience.subtitle: Designed for immersive discovery, seamless communication, and measurable outcomes.

hallNavigation.title: 2D/3D Hall Navigation
hallNavigation.description: Visitors move naturally through your event using fluid hall exploration and stand discovery.

standExperience.title: Interactive Stand Experience
standExperience.description: Show products, media, resources, and business profiles in a polished digital booth environment.

chatInteraction.title: Chat and Live Interaction
chatInteraction.description: Connect visitors and exhibitors through instant messaging and contextual communication tools.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple journey from event entry to high-value business interaction.

joinEvent.title: Join Event
joinEvent.description: Sign in as a visitor or enterprise and enter your selected event in seconds.

exploreStands.title: Explore Stands
exploreStands.description: Discover powerful exhibitors, products, and live sessions from an intuitive hall view.

interact.title: Interact
interact.description: Start meaningful chats, request meetings, and engage directly with brands.

buyConnect.title: Buy / Connect
buyConnect.description: Complete purchases seamlessly or capture leads to convert engagement into outcomes.

socialProof.title: Trusted by Modern Event Teams
socialProof.subtitle: Built for organizers and enterprises that care about premium attendee experiences.

cta.title: Start your virtual exhibition today
cta.subtitle: Launch a premium event experience for visitors, exhibitors, and partners with one unified platform.

opsLead.quote: IVEP helped us launch a global expo experience in days, with far better engagement than expected.

progDirector.quote: The platform feels premium, easy to navigate, and highly practical for both visitors and enterprises.
